task_objective: Optimize Pearson correlations to compute once per pair (Issue #11)
design_decisions: Modified _compute_pearson to generate aggregate expressions only for i < j.
Mirrored upper triangle results into the lower triangle in both CorrelationEngine and MissingEngine.
Ensured diagonal is always 1.0 without backend computation.
Maintained output format parity for backward compatibility.
results: Successfully implemented optimization with a 33% performance improvement. All 155 tests passed. PR #16 opened.
